studyName: XPC and Non-XPC Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma Mutation Rate Study

tables.description: Sample ID, body site, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, primary or metastatic tumor, primary tumor location, and sequencing center of participants with or without cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma and involved in the "Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Complementation Group C, (XPC) and Non-XPC Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma (cSCC) Mutation Rate Study" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, sample source, source sample ID, and sample use variable of participants with or without cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma and involved in the "Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Complementation Group C, (XPC) and Non-XPC Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma (cSCC) Mutation Rate Study" project.

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, subject source, and source subject ID of participants with or without cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma and involved in the "Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Complementation Group C, (XPC) and Non-XPC Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma (cSCC) Mutation Rate Study" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject ID, gender, and germline repair genotype of participants with or without cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma and involved in the "Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Complementation Group C, (XPC) and Non-XPC Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma (cSCC) Mutation Rate Study" project.

variables.name: germline repair genotype
variables.description: Germline mutation of DNA repair genes
